steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage calls decentralized space a central principle of Cunningham’s philosophy and notes that his approach marked a radical departure from his contemporaries.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A adds that Cunningham incorporated his principles with great skill and artistry, which directly explains how his approach led to the result described by the participial phrase.

The other three choices introduce unrelated details about his dancing, company founding, or reputation and do not link his principles to the reception of his works.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
